description: Configure a secure insurance claim portal in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!) titled 'Auto Insurance Claim Portal 2025'. The survey must include two question groups: 'Incident Details' and 'Document Submission'. The 'Incident Details' group requires a Yes/No question (Code: HAS_EVIDENCE) asking 'Do you have photographic evidence of the damage?'. The 'Document Submission' group requires two File Upload questions: 'Upload Signed Claim Form (PDF Only)' (Code: FORM_PDF), restricted to a single PDF file, and 'Upload Damage Photos' (Code: DMG_PHOTOS), restricted to five jpg or png files. The 'DMG_PHOTOS' question must use conditional logic to only appear if 'HAS_EVIDENCE' is answered 'Yes'. The final
